messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Create a PowerPoint presentation titled 'Investment Portfolio Review' for our finance clients. The file should include 9 slides following an elegant black and gold theme with premium typography. Use English for the content and set the slide size to 16:9 Widescreen orientation. Save the final document as portfolio_review.pptx. External APIs or web scraping are strictly forbidden. You are required to use XL_CHART_TYPE instead of importing or using ChartType from pptx.enum.chart when adding charts. Additionally, you must check if slide.shapes.title is not None before accessing .text on the title shape. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections, with code enclosed in ```python fences and non-code text in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
import os


# --- Constants ---
SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.333)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

BLACK = RGBColor(0x0A, 0x0A, 0x0A)
DARK_GRAY = RGBColor(0x1C, 0x1C, 0x1E)
GOLD = RGBColor(0xD4, 0xAF, 0x37)
LIGHT_GOLD = RGBColor(0xF2, 0xD0, 0x6B)
WHITE = RGBColor(0xFF, 0xFF, 0xFF)
OFF_WHITE = RGBColor(0xF8, 0xF8, 0xF8)
CARD_BG = RGBColor(0x14, 0x14, 16)

FONT_PRIMARY = "Calibri"
FONT_FALLBACK = "Arial"
MARGIN_LEFT = Inches(0.5)
MARGIN_RIGHT = Inches(0.5)
CONTENT_WIDTH = SLIDE_WIDTH - MARGIN_LEFT - MARGIN_RIGHT


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#0A0A0A"):
    bg = slide.background
    fill = bg.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, left, top, width, height, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(left, top, width, height)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_PRIMARY
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, left, top, width, height, bg_color=CARD_BG, border_color=None):
    shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
    shape.fill.solid()
    shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
    if border_color:
        shape.line.color.rgb = border_color
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
    else:
        shape.line.fill.background()
    return shape


def add_section_label(slide, text, left=Inches(0.7), top=Inches(0.4)):
    add_text_box(slide, left, top, Inches(3), Inches(0.5), text.upper(), font_size=12, bold=True, color=GOLD)
    line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top + Inches(0.55), Inches(1.8), Pt(2))
    line.fill.solid()
    line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    line.line.fill.background()


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages=9):
    footer_text = f"{page_num} / {total_pages}"
    add_text_box(slide, SLIDE_WIDTH - Inches(1.5), Inches(7.0), Inches(1.2), Inches(0.4), footer_text, font_size=10, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, left, top, width, height):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, left, top, width, height)
    else:
        shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, left, top, width, height)
        shape.fill.solid()
        shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_GRAY
        shape.line.color.rgb = GOLD
        shape.line.width = Pt(1.5)
        add_text_box(slide, left + Inches(0.2), top + Inches(0.3), width - Inches(0.4), height - Inches(0.6), "Image Placeholder", font_size=12, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


# --- Slide Builders ---

def create_title_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    # Gold accent line at top
    top_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Pt(4))
    top_line.fill.solid()
    top_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    top_line.line.fill.background()

    # Title
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.5), "Investment Portfolio Review", font_size=48, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    # Subtitle line
    sub_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.5), Pt(3))
    sub_line.fill.solid()
    sub_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    sub_line.line.fill.background()

    # Subtitle text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(6), Inches(0.8), "Comprehensive Analysis & Strategic Recommendations", font_size=20, color=OFF_WHITE)

    # Date and company info
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.8), Inches(6), Inches(0.5), "Q4 2024 | Prepared for Our Valued Clients", font_size=14, color=GOLD)

    # Bottom gold line
    bottom_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.3), SLIDE_WIDTH, Pt(4))
    bottom_line.fill.solid()
    bottom_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    bottom_line.line.fill.background()

    add_footer(slide, 1)


def create_agenda_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    # Title area
    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Agenda"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD
                r.font.bold = True

    add_section_label(slide, "Overview", top=Inches(1.2))

    agenda_items = [
        ("01", "Portfolio Overview & Performance"),
        ("02", "Asset Allocation Analysis"),
        ("03", "Quarterly Performance Trends"),
        ("04", "Top Holdings Review"),
        ("05", "Risk Assessment Metrics"),
        ("06", "Market Outlook & Strategy"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(5.8)
    card_height = Inches(0.7)
    start_top = Inches(2.1)
    gap = Inches(0.35)

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(agenda_items):
        y = start_top + i * (card_height + gap)
        # Number circle
        num_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), y, card_height, card_height)
        num_shape.fill.solid()
        num_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
        num_shape.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), y + Inches(0.15), card_height, card_height, num, font_size=16, bold=True, color=BLACK, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        # Label text
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.3), y + Inches(0.18), Inches(4), card_height - Inches(0.35), label, font_size=16, color=OFF_WHITE)


def create_portfolio_overview_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Portfolio Overview"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Key Metrics", top=Inches(1.2))

    metrics = [
        ("Total AUM", "$2.4B"),
        ("YTD Return", "+18.7%"),
        ("Active Positions", "142"),
        ("Win Rate", "67.3%"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.8)
    card_height = Inches(1.5)
    start_x = Inches(0.9)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    y_pos = Inches(2.2)

    for i, (label, value) in enumerate(metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, border_color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6), label, font_size=13, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.7), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.6), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Summary paragraph
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.5), Inches(2.5),
                 "Our portfolio has demonstrated strong performance across all major asset classes during Q4 2024. The diversified strategy continues to deliver consistent alpha generation while maintaining disciplined risk management protocols.",
                 font_size=14, color=OFF_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 3)


def create_asset_allocation_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Asset Allocation"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Current Distribution", top=Inches(1.2))

    # Pie chart data
    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Equities", "Fixed Income", "Real Estate", "Commodities", "Cash"]
    chart_data.add_series("Allocation", (45, 25, 15, 8, 7))

    left = Inches(0.9)
    top = Inches(2.0)
    width = Inches(6.0)
    height = Inches(4.5)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.PIE, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = False
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(12)
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = WHITE

    # Legend on the right
    legend_items = [
        ("Equities", "45%"),
        ("Fixed Income", "25%"),
        ("Real Estate", "15%"),
        ("Commodities", "8%"),
        ("Cash & Equivalents", "7%"),
    ]

    legend_y = Inches(2.0)
    for i, (asset, pct) in enumerate(legend_items):
        y = legend_y + i * Inches(0.65)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), y, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.5), asset, font_size=14, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(10.8), y, Inches(2), Inches(0.5), pct, font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)

    add_footer(slide, 4)


def create_performance_trend_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Performance Trends"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Quarterly Returns", top=Inches(1.2))

    from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Q1 2023", "Q2 2023", "Q3 2023", "Q4 2023", "Q1 2024", "Q2 2024", "Q3 2024", "Q4 2024"]
    chart_data.add_series("Portfolio Return (%)", (5.2, 7.8, -1.3, 9.1, 6.4, 8.2, 4.7, 7.5))

    left = Inches(0.9)
    top = Inches(2.0)
    width = Inches(11.5)
    height = Inches(4.0)

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS, left, top, width, height, chart_data)
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    plot = chart.plots[0]
    series = plot.series[0]
    series.format.line.color.rgb = GOLD
    series.format.line.width = Pt(3)
    from pptx.enum.chart import XL_MARKER_STYLE
    series.marker.style = XL_MARKER_STYLE.CIRCLE
    series.marker.size = 8
    series.marker.format.fill.solid()
    series.marker.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD

    # Add data labels
    plot.has_data_labels = True
    data_labels = plot.data_labels
    data_labels.font.size = Pt(10)
    data_labels.font.color.rgb = WHITE

    add_footer(slide, 5)


def create_top_holdings_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Top Holdings"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Portfolio Composition", top=Inches(1.2))

    holdings = [
        ("1", "Apple Inc.", "AAPL", "8.5%", "+22.3%"),
        ("2", "Microsoft Corp.", "MSFT", "7.2%", "+19.8%"),
        ("3", "NVIDIA Corp.", "NVDA", "6.8%", "+45.1%"),
        ("4", "Amazon.com Inc.", "AMZN", "5.4%", "+15.6%"),
        ("5", "Alphabet Inc.", "GOOGL", "4.9%", "+12.4%"),
    ]

    # Table header
    col_widths = [Inches(0.5), Inches(3.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.8), Inches(1.8)]
    headers = ["#", "Company", "Ticker", "Weight", "Return"]
    x_start = Inches(2.0)
    y_header = Inches(2.0)

    for i, (header, w) in enumerate(zip(headers, col_widths)):
        add_text_box(slide, x_start + sum(col_widths[:i]), y_header, w, Inches(0.5), header, font_size=13, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    # Header line
    header_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x_start, y_header + Inches(0.5), sum(col_widths), Pt(2))
    header_line.fill.solid()
    header_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    header_line.line.fill.background()

    # Data rows
    row_height = Inches(0.6)
    for i, (rank, name, ticker, weight, ret) in enumerate(holdings):
        y_row = y_header + Inches(0.7) + i * row_height
        bg_color = CARD_BG if i % 2 == 0 else DARK_GRAY
        row_shape = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x_start, y_row, sum(col_widths), row_height - Pt(1))
        row_shape.fill.solid()
        row_shape.fill.fore_color.rgb = bg_color
        row_shape.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x_start + Inches(0.1), y_row + Inches(0.12), col_widths[0], row_height - Pt(4), rank, font_size=13, bold=True, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x_start + sum(col_widths[:1]) + Inches(0.1), y_row + Inches(0.12), col_widths[1], row_height - Pt(4), name, font_size=13, color=WHITE)
        add_text_box(slide, x_start + sum(col_widths[:2]) + Inches(0.1), y_row + Inches(0.12), col_widths[2], row_height - Pt(4), ticker, font_size=13, color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x_start + sum(col_widths[:3]) + Inches(0.1), y_row + Inches(0.12), col_widths[3], row_height - Pt(4), weight, font_size=13, color=WHITE)
        ret_color = RGBColor(0x4C, 0xAF, 0x50) if "+" in ret else RGBColor(0xE7, 0x4C, 0x3C)
        add_text_box(slide, x_start + sum(col_widths[:4]) + Inches(0.1), y_row + Inches(0.12), col_widths[4], row_height - Pt(4), ret, font_size=13, bold=True, color=ret_color)

    add_footer(slide, 6)


def create_risk_analysis_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Risk Analysis"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Key Risk Metrics", top=Inches(1.2))

    risk_metrics = [
        ("Sharpe Ratio", "1.85", "Excellent"),
        ("Volatility (Annual)", "14.2%", "Moderate"),
        ("Beta vs S&P 500", "0.92", "Below Market"),
        ("Max Drawdown", "-8.3%", "Controlled"),
    ]

    card_width = Inches(2.8)
    card_height = Inches(1.6)
    start_x = Inches(0.9)
    gap = Inches(0.4)
    y_pos = Inches(2.2)

    for i, (metric, value, status) in enumerate(risk_metrics):
        x = start_x + i * (card_width + gap)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y_pos, card_width, card_height, border_color=GOLD)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.15), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), metric, font_size=13, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(0.65), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.5), value, font_size=28, bold=True, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

        status_color = RGBColor(0x4C, 0xAF, 0x50) if "Excellent" in status or "Below" in status or "Controlled" in status else RGBColor(0xF3, 0x9C, 0x12)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y_pos + Inches(1.2), card_width - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), status, font_size=11, color=status_color, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    # Risk summary box
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(4.3), Inches(11.5), Inches(2.5),
                 "Our risk management framework employs dynamic hedging strategies and continuous monitoring of portfolio exposure. The Sharpe ratio of 1.85 indicates superior risk-adjusted returns relative to the benchmark index.",
                 font_size=14, color=OFF_WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 7)


def create_market_outlook_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    title_shape = slide.shapes.title
    if title_shape is not None:
        title_shape.text = "Market Outlook"
        for p in title_shape.text_frame.paragraphs:
            for r in p.runs:
                r.font.size = Pt(40)
                r.font.color.rgb = GOLD

    add_section_label(slide, "Strategic Recommendations", top=Inches(1.2))

    # Left column - Outlook
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(0.6), "Market Outlook", font_size=24, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    outlook_items = [
        "Equity markets expected to remain volatile with selective opportunities in technology and healthcare sectors.",
        "Fixed income positioning benefits from anticipated rate stabilization by major central banks.",
        "Real estate investment trusts showing renewed strength driven by commercial sector recovery.",
        "Commodities poised for upside as supply constraints persist across key industrial metals.",
    ]

    y_item = Inches(2.7)
    for item in outlook_items:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), y_item, Inches(5.3), Inches(0.8), f"• {item}", font_size=13, color=OFF_WHITE)
        y_item += Inches(0.9)

    # Right column - Key Takeaways (gold box)
    takeaway_box = add_card(slide, Inches(7.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.8), bg_color=DARK_GRAY, border_color=GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.6), Inches(2.3), Inches(4.7), Inches(0.5), "Key Takeaways", font_size=20, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    takeaways = [
        "Maintain overweight equity allocation through Q1 2025.",
        "Increase exposure to AI and semiconductor stocks.",
        "Reduce duration risk in fixed income portfolio.",
        "Consider tactical allocation to emerging markets.",
    ]

    y_takeaway = Inches(3.0)
    for t in takeaways:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.6), y_takeaway, Inches(4.7), Inches(0.5), f"▸ {t}", font_size=13, color=WHITE)
        y_takeaway += Inches(0.65)

    add_footer(slide, 8)


def create_thank_you_slide(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#0A0A0A")

    # Gold accent lines
    top_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Pt(4))
    top_line.fill.solid()
    top_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    top_line.line.fill.background()

    bottom_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.3), SLIDE_WIDTH, Pt(4))
    bottom_line.fill.solid()
    bottom_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    bottom_line.line.fill.background()

    # Thank you text
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(2.0), Inches(10), Inches(1.5), "Thank You", font_size=48, bold=True, color=GOLD)

    sub_line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(2.5), Pt(3))
    sub_line.fill.solid()
    sub_line.fill.fore_color.rgb = GOLD
    sub_line.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.8), Inches(8), Inches(0.6), "We appreciate your continued trust and partnership.", font_size=20, color=OFF_WHITE)

    # Contact info box
    contact_box = add_card(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.7), Inches(10.3), Inches(1.8), bg_color=DARK_GRAY, border_color=GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(4.9), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), "Contact Us", font_size=16, bold=True, color=GOLD)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), "investments@portfolio.com", font_size=14, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.0), Inches(5.3), Inches(4), Inches(0.4), "+1 (800) 555-0199", font_size=14, color=WHITE)

    # Disclaimer
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(6.7), Inches(10.3), Inches(0.5), "This presentation is for informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice.", font_size=10, color=GOLD, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)

    add_footer(slide, 9)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    create_title_slide(prs)
    create_agenda_slide(prs)
    create_portfolio_overview_slide(prs)
    create_asset_allocation_slide(prs)
    create_performance_trend_slide(prs)
    create_top_holdings_slide(prs)
    create_risk_analysis_slide(prs)
    create_market_outlook_slide(prs)
    create_thank_you_slide(prs)

    output_file = "portfolio_review.pptx"
    prs.save(output_file)
    print(f"Presentation saved to {output_file}")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
